title: facelis lasiocarpa
intro: Facelis lasiocarpa, also known as prickly phlox or bear's head phlox, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Facelis lasiocarpa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Facelis lasiocarpa can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and stems in a decoction to create a medicinal infusion.
